title: Iterate mutably over collection wrappers
scenario: Some update operations should borrow the wrapper mutably and edit each line in place without exposing the Vec field.
instructions: Implement IntoIterator for &mut OrderLines, yielding &mut OrderLine values.

hints.body: Keep the Exposing iteration on collection wrappers code active and implement IntoIterator for &mut OrderLines, yielding &mut OrderLine values.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Iterate mutably over collection wrappers is shown below.

completionExplanation: Iterate mutably over collection wrappers now extends the active Exposing iteration on collection wrappers code with wrap mut into iterator. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
